final:
// // This module implements a four-bit wide, 2-to-1 demultiplexer.
module top_module(
    input[4:0] inA,
    input[4:0] inB,
    input[0:0] sel,
    output reg[4:0] out
);always @* begin
        if (sel==1'b0) begin
            out <= inA;
        end else begin
            out <= inB;
        end
    end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a four-bit wide, 2-to-1 demultiplexer.
